page.error_take_photo: An kasa ɗaukar hoto. Da fatan a sake gwadawa.

edit_bio.title: Gyara Bayani
edit_bio.placeholder: Gaya wa mutane game da kanka

hero.name_error_empty: Da fatan a shigar da sunanka.
hero.hint_add_photo: Mutane suna amincewa da fuskokin. Ƙara hoto don abokai su san kai ne.
hero.hint_add_bio: Bayani gajere yana taimakawa sosai. Me mutane ya kamata su sani game da kai?

stats.motivation_start: Ƙididdigan ka suna farawa a lokacin da ka yi wani abu. Je ka bincika.
stats.motivation_close: Wuri {{count}} ƙari don isa {{tier}}. Kana kusa.
stats.motivation_close_plural: Wurare {{count}} ƙari don isa {{tier}}. Kana kusa.
stats.motivation_week: Mako daya cikakke. Daidaitawa tana da kyau a kanka.
stats.motivation_month: Kwanaki 30 a jere. Wataƙila ba za a iya tsayar da kai ba.

interests.empty_text: Gaya mana me kake sha'awar — yana taimaka mana nemo abin da kake so.

friend.profile_unavailable_title: Wannan bayanan ba su samuwa ba
friend.profile_unavailable_body: Bayanan wannan mutumi na iya zama masu zaman kansu, ko kuma ba ku da alaƙa.
